---
title: Git
description: |
  Version control & collaboration with &nbsp;[![](img/logo_git.png){width="1.3em"}](https://git-scm.com/)
title-block-banner: true
---

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Courses</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, 5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Getting started with &nbsp;![](img/logo_git.png){width="1.2em"}](top_intro.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[A course on version control]{.text-muted}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Collaborating on &nbsp;![](img/logo_github_red.png){width="1.2em"}](top_col.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[A course on collaborative workflows]{.text-muted}

:::

:::

::::

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Webinars</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, 5, -5, -5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Data version control with![](img/logo_dvc.svg){width="2.8em"}](wb_dvc.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[A great Git UI: Lazygit](wb_lazygit.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Workshops</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, 5, 5, -5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Searching a &nbsp;![](img/logo_git.png){width="1.2em"} project](practice_repo/ws_search.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Collaborating through &nbsp;![](img/logo_git.png){width="1.2em"}](ws_collab.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Contributing to projects](ws_contrib.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::
